title: Versioned save + manifest + prune
acceptance_criteria: Manifest includes SHA-256 dataset hash, row counts, augmentation count
Decompress subcommand reads .gz files back to plain JSONL
Prune-keep and prune-older-than flags remove old versions
completion_summary: Save writes versioned splits with auto-increment and manifest (SHA-256, row counts). Load reads manifest. PruneKeep/PruneOlderThan remove versions. Decompress handles .gz→.jsonl. Full build pipeline wired. 9 tests pass.
